goal: Build a production-candidate CopilotKit AI chat inside the main Django UI while keeping Django as the owner of sessions, permissions, history, audit and confirmation.
global_constraints: Django remains the system of record for session, permissions, chat history, audit and confirmation.
CopilotKit-specific code stays inside the CopilotKit driver and Copilot Runtime service.
services.agent_runtime.protocols must stay usable by future native AG-UI-compatible UI.
Browser clients must not receive session cookies, Django AI gateway tokens, raw actor context, raw PII, raw UNC paths or full DOM payloads through AG-UI state.
UI commands must be namespaced, versioned and allow-listed.
Domain writes must go through Django permissions and confirmation flow.
Legacy driver must remain a rollback path.
Update .desc.json and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml after structural changes.
cross_cutting_acceptance: LOCAL_BUSINESS_AI_UI_DRIVER=copilotkit activates the CopilotKit chat in the main Django UI.
Starting a new chat creates or selects a clean Django chat session.
The page context envelope is applied without leaking raw sensitive data.
AG-UI streams contain protocol metadata and map failures to RUN_ERROR.
ui.open_right_panel is normalized once and executed only through the safe frontend bridge.
Chat history and AgentActionLog remain in Django.
Telemetry and hosted persistence remain disabled unless a separate decision changes this.
E2E covers the main CopilotKit chat scenario and rollback remains available.
implementation_notes: Land shared protocol fixes outside driver-specific branches where possible.
Keep compatibility path /localBusinessUiCommands only while existing CopilotKit island needs it.
Prefer additive AG-UI extensions under local_business.* over breaking event shapes.
Use existing Django chat and audit models before adding persistence.
Document production differences in deployment notes before owner acceptance.
